extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter won the circuit finish sprint after BORA-hansgrohe controlled eight climbs on the repeated circuit, taking 10-second bonus.
tactical_patterns: BORA-hansgrohe paced entire circuit with eight climbs to control for SAGAN rather than letting breakaway form.
SAGAN attacked entering final right-hander 650m out but soft-pedaled to win from draft, suggesting sprint confidence.
Teams selected sprinters on climbing ability: BAUHAUS absent from lead group after repeated 4-lap circuit climbs.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: frustrated by race speed but won first race after three-week break, planning Giro prep through difficult mountain stages
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: neutral: second place with TRETNIK leadout shows climbing form holding despite repeated circuit ascents
rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: negative: dropped from lead sprint group on repeated circuit climbs, less climbing durability than SAGAN/COLBRELLI
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: maintains GC lead by 9 seconds over teammate PIDCOCK after controlling stage
